description_long: This object is a firearm with a distinctive black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden components on the stock, handguard, and grip. The magazine is curved and black, typical of certain military rifles, and the overall silhouette is angular with a prominent front sight and gas tube above the barrel. The stock is solid and straight, extending from the rear of the receiver, while the handguard and grip are ergonomically shaped for handling. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses the trigger, providing protection and structural support. The finish of the metal parts is matte, while the wooden sections have a slightly textured, natural appearance. The object is detailed enough to show key mechanical features such as the magazine release, safety selector, and charging handle.
description: A black and wood-finished firearm with a curved magazine, solid stock, and prominent front sight, featuring both metal and wooden components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, front sight, and the alignment of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full profile, including the curved magazine, wooden stock, handguard, and detailed receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock, the straight alignment of the barrel, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the magazine, trigger guard, and wooden components clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
